title: [Connor_CZ] EN VN v4 (English Visual Novel Collection)
description:
### **Keep updated in [Telegram group:](https://t.me/+6iu5SOJ36IxkNzU8) [![Telegram](https://i.ibb.co/drnQxvV/telegram-1.png)](https://t.me/+6iu5SOJ36IxkNzU8) or [![Ko-Fi](https://i.ibb.co/YNjnBp8/kofi2.png)](https://ko-fi.com/connorcz)**

Revisited the old EN VN Collection, coz it was embarassing. Here lies 4x more English VNs (over 750), 1700+ various CGs and a few OSTs. Every rar file is compressed on "Very Fast" preset, saves 15% of storage on average. Not sure if I'll seed 24/7, but I'm definitelly going to get it to 100% eventually
I couldn't get around 10 games from superelmo due to lack of seeds, but otherwise I managed to include his games, or at least trumped them by better alternative.

Reminder on why am I doing this - I grown tired of those insanely popular ad-filled websites that released it on fishy cloud hosting services. Also, in this world full of geo locking, DRM, corpo greed, child safety regulations and other crap, the torrent seems to be an easy way to lock things up in time.
Kinda miss those days where physical releases weren't so rare - you bought it you owned it...
Having said that, It still isn't a bad thing to buy yourself something once in a while on Mangagamer, JAST, Steam or Itch

```
Some games contain vndb.txt which has the VNDB.com link, other may use the scheme listed under here:

ver. = version
rev. = revision
comp. = compatibility
setup = you will need to install this
.iso = DVD copy, need to install
no-install = ready to play
ost = Soundtrack
art = Artbook
18+ = adult patch is included or ready to apply (games without 18+ tag may not be adult at all)

Novels from GOG.com have their version in the .exe file name.

Games from Main and gog.com are tested on Windows 11/10 system and are working, however human error may occur.
For the compatibility with most games, I advise you to use atleast Windows 10 with DirectX 11 video card and install Visual C+ libraries.


Compiled by Connor_CZ with the help of @ImKota, thank you.
```

title: [RJ01109096] Seed of the Dead Charm Song DLC v2.09
description:
Take the post apocalyptic world by storm with an enchanting voice as your weapon!
Survive the zombie hellscape and strive to emerge as its #1 top idol!

Jam-packed with a brand new array of absurd content.
The world's first ever post apocalyptic FPS anime girl idol game!
Brand new DLC for this increasingly outlandish game has arrived!

----------------------------------------
* Requires the base game: "Seed of the Dead: Sweet Home" to function.
https://www.dlsite.com/maniax/work/=/product_id/RJ330023.html


New Heroine
Einomaru
Home Town Observer and back-up supporter to the protagonist and his team.
It turns out that all this time, she was a girl with hopes and dreams of becoming a world famous idol. Armed with a lovely singing voice, elegant dance moves, and pistols akimbo, she aims to become the zombie ravaged world's #1 idol!


Several weeks following the events of SOD: SH. just as peace was finally starting to return to Home Town, Einomaru went missing during a patrol.
Fearing the presence of a new enemy, the protag and his team set out on a search and rescue mission to find her.
However, what they found was their missing girl mesmerizing a horde of Zs with her skillful song and dance!

Despite having fended off the zombies up until now, it was clear a menacing new type of mob is making its way toward Home Town.
Their only way out of this desperate situation, is to charm their enemies using the power of song.
Thus began their journey into idoldom...to protect the surviving human race!

Story
Added Gameplay: Idol Mode
Become an idol producer and win over the zombie infested world with music!
The heroines are in need of dance lessons, live gigs, and other idol work.
Put on spectacular shows, grow your fan base, and set your sights on becoming a top idol!

Earn money through idol work, then buy items to deepen your relationship with each heroine.
Earn their trust and affection to become even stronger allies in battles against zombies!


Even More H Scenes!


A new heroine means new H scenes!
Plus all-new scenes featuring the original girls!
Get to know Einomaru while deepening your existing relationships!
And that's not all -- there are new stages and new enemies, too!
That means even more ways for the heroines to meet their deeply dirty doom...
And thanks to the brand-new outfits and accessories, they can do it all in style!
Features

15~30 hours of gameplay
5 new variety-rich stages
1 new heroine
40+ heroine events
6 mini games
30+ defeat scenes
100+ H scenes
4 difficulty levels
5 new costumes
100+ items
10+ weapons
5+ facilities
8+ skills

This product requires the base game: "Seed of the Dead: Sweet Home" (RJ330023) to function.
This product contains overlapping content with "Seed of the Dead: Complete Edition" (RJ01119297)
(English product description provided by the creator.)


https://www.dlsite.com/maniax/work/=/product_id/RJ01109096.html

--------------
Version 2.09 of the base game is required
https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/4005960
It's DLC, move the pak files into your Seed of the Dead folder: 
■How to install
1) Copy the following data included in this folder
　pakchunk100-WindowsNoEditor.pak
　pakchunk100optional-WindowsNoEditor.pak
2) SeedOfTheDead: Move to the following folder in SweetHome's client data
  \SoD_CS_2.09DL_SH\SoD2\Content\Paks
3) Installation is now complete
